name: Fresh Fruit Delight
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare fresh fruits in season: slice apples, cut melons into cubes, slice kiwis, and halve strawberries.
2. Arrange the prepared fruit on a platter or serve individually.
3. Using cocktail toothpicks, dip each piece of fruit into an equal mixture of cream cheese and marshmallow cream.
4. Place the dipped fruit back onto the platter or serve as desired.
A delicious appetizer.
